summary: His right leg was bent at an impossible

mechanics.name_guess: His right leg was bent at an impossible
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 013 > vehicles > His right leg was bent at an impossible
mechanics.excerpt: His right leg was bent at an impossible angle and the jagged end of bone from his lower right arm stuck through both skin and the cloth of his fatigues The breath knocked from him Stephen gasped in great lungfuls of air and then began swearing in at least three different languages on every pain-filled exhale_ The bay floor shook: Dumbly; for moment thought the light tremor was the aftershock of Stephen s hard fall_ Then movement caught my eye _ and barely had time to think about dodging before the OmniMech took another ungainly step, nartowiy missing Stephen and me.
